General.Name: China Digital Video Holdings Ltd
General.Description: China Digital Video Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, researches, develops, and sells video-related and broadcasting equipment and software to TV broadcasters, new media operators, and other digital video content providers in the People's Republic of China. It also provides related technical services, including CreaStudio, a multi-camera recording and editing service used by entertainment TV shows to produce and operate media content. The company was formerly known as China Digital Video Limited. China Digital Video Holdings Limited was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: China Digital Video Technical Plaza, Beijing, China, 100195
